summary: Iteration 77 - School Settings Page Redesign Testing. All 7 tabs working correctly with clean Navy-themed design. Hero Card displays readiness percentage (11%), all tabs navigate properly, and Add buttons open modals correctly.

minor.issue: Several API endpoints returning 404 (likely expected for empty data)

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

tests: Hero Card (Readiness Card) displays correctly - PASSED
Percentage (11%) displayed in circular progress - PASSED
Tab 'نظرة عامة' (Overview) found and clickable - PASSED
Tab 'أيام العمل' (Workdays) found and clickable - PASSED
Workdays Tab - 7 interactive day cards displayed - PASSED
Timings Tab - Settings form displayed - PASSED
Classes Tab - Add Class button works, modal opens - PASSED
Teachers Tab - Add Teacher button works, modal opens - PASSED
Assignments Tab - Add Assignment button found - PASSED
Constraints Tab - Hard and Soft constraints sections displayed - PASSED

hero_card.details: Displays readiness status with percentage circle (11%), critical issues count (8), and 'أكمل البيانات أولاً' button

overview_tab.details: Shows 4 statistics cards (فصل دراسي, معلم, إسناد, أيام دراسة), timing summary, and academic year settings

workdays_tab.details: 7 interactive day cards with green (working) and gray (weekend) colors, save button present

timings_tab.details: Form with day start time, periods per day, period duration, break duration settings

classes_tab.details: Empty state with 'لا يوجد فصول مسجلة' message, Add Class button opens modal with form

teachers_tab.details: Empty state with 'لا يوجد معلمين مسجلين' message, Add Teacher button opens modal with form

assignments_tab.details: Empty state with 'لا يوجد إسنادات' message, Add Assignment button present

constraints_tab.details: Hard Constraints (6 items with red styling) and Soft Constraints (5 items with toggle switches)

design_review.color_scheme: Navy (#1C3D74) as primary color - clean and professional
design_review.tabs_design: Clean horizontal tabs with active state highlighting
design_review.cards_design: White cards with subtle shadows and proper spacing
design_review.rtl_support: Full RTL support with dir='rtl' attribute
design_review.responsive: Grid layouts adapt to different screen sizes

action_items: Minor: Add DialogDescription to modals to fix accessibility warning
critical_code_review_comments: File is ~1030 lines - slightly over recommended 700 lines but acceptable for complex page
Missing DialogDescription in Add Teacher and Add Class modals (accessibility warning)
data-testid attributes present on key elements (readiness-hero-card, day-*, tab-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: School Settings Page has been completely redesigned with Navy theme. All 7 tabs (Overview, Workdays, Timings, Classes, Teachers, Assignments, Constraints) are working. Hero Card shows readiness percentage. Add buttons open modals correctly. Minor accessibility warning for DialogDescription can be addressed in future iterations.
